name: impact-preview recommends prune for a rule that produces zero matches across the working tree per F-6 verdict surface
command: mkdir -p tree && printf 'clean code\n' > tree/x.js && printf '%s' '{"rules":[{"id":"r","detector":"grep -n SHOULD_NOT_MATCH || true"}]}' > r.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/impact-preview.sh" --rule-file r.json --root tree --format json 2>out.txt && grep -q '"recommendation":"prune"' out.txt && echo pruned 1>&2
